text:
Once upon a time, there was a wise old owl who always knew where the best blackberries were. Everyone loved the owl friend because she knew all the secrets.

Once, the old owl went looking for the best blackberries in the forest. She couldn�t help but wonder what might be out there.

She looked everywhere. Some were in thick bushes where no owl ever went.

One day, she discovered a place that had a lot of berries. Some were on a wire. She couldn't believe it

There were all sorts of berries. She couldn't tell what they were. They weren't any kind she'd ever seen.

She could only tell, though she wished she could identify them, by their colors. There were purple. And there were some with brown specks. They looked kind of sweet.

The owls went exploring.
